## 🧠 HyperGold AI Hub — PR Checklist

### Type of Change
- [ ] New asset (framework / dataset / model / tutorial / benchmark / agent / tool)
- [ ] Update to existing asset
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI/CD
- [ ] Documentation

### Contribution Checklist
- [ ] `metadata.json` added/updated with correct schema
- [ ] `README.md` with install, API reference, and usage examples
- [ ] License declared in `metadata.json`
- [ ] Tests added in `tests/`
- [ ] Backwards-compatibility: confirmed or MAJOR version bump with migration guide
- [ ] CI/CD passes locally (`python -m pytest tests/ -v`)

### Description
<!-- What does this add/change and why? -->

### Performance Impact
<!-- Any effect on benchmark scores, CI time, or index size? -->

### Breaking Changes
<!-- List any breaking changes here -->
None
